title: Publication attention state (v1)
description: Installation-scoped, single-flight attention state (spec 9): a monotonic lineage cursor and the set of seen content-digest lineage keys.

cursor.description: Monotonic attention cursor; null before the first accepted signal.

value.description: ISO-8601 published_at of the last accepted signal.

lineage.description: Cursor lineage id, preserved across migration.

seen.description: Seen content-digest lineage keys. Dedupe is by content digest, so the same content on a different feed entry id is still a duplicate.
